skills.name: Nebula Lure
skills.description: Summons a cosmic vortex that attracts all nearby mythical fish to your line.

skills.name: Reality Warp
skills.description: Instantly teleports the fish to your inventory without the mini-game.

skills.name: Plasma Hook
skills.description: Burns the fish, reducing its fight energy 50% faster.

skills.name: Hydro Blast
skills.description: A powerful jet of water that exhausts heavy titans quickly.

skills.name: Echo Pulse
skills.description: Highlights rare fish in the water with a golden aura.

skills.name: Swift Cast
skills.description: Reduces the casting animation time by 40%.

skills.name: Standard Pull
skills.description: The fundamental technique. Reliable but lacks power.
